TLDR Exist (not derogatory)
- Her cards have retain so you don't play them allowing you to cycle your deck more, few times you use one of her cards for on demand weakness app
- Once in a blue moon you may Exalt with her which gives you 3 Arith in card form
One of the best low investment supports

Common “Best” Chaos/Ultra Kath uses Awakeners like Tinct/Clem/Horla/Winkle

You need to see the value yourself to understand the priority
For Horla, activating Emotion is a priority. For Castor, getting Plumes.
I'm not familiar with Clem gameplay, so can't say for sure.
For Tinct, u never activate her Leap.
Clem and castor kind of compete for +str and shield/plume generation.
I prefer going +str unless I need to play defensively, and castor can apply enough corrosion for clem exalt damage.
